decisionReason: Miami grease-service routing stays live for operators, but the finder should remain held from search until provider evidence gets stronger.
noindexReason: Miami-Dade's transporter workflow is published, but the current grease-service cards are still public-contact only, so this route stays noindex-monitored.
promotionChecklist: Attach at least one authority-backed Miami-Dade transporter or permitted-hauler evidence link to a renderable provider card.
Keep three renderable providers with direct Miami coverage details and receipt or manifest handling clarity.
Promote only after the route shows stronger provider evidence than public contact pages alone.
